title: Valid FHIR bundle rejected
body: Uploading our patient Bundle returns "Uploaded JSON is not a FHIR Bundle" even though resourceType is Bundle. File is from Epic export and opens fine in validator.

title: FHIR upload says success but patient not in list
body: The upload panel shows parsed successfully, but the patient directory does not refresh unless I reload the browser.

title: Cannot upload JSON from Windows machine
body: A care coordinator saved the bundle from Windows and upload fails with UTF-8 decode error. Need clearer handling or message.

title: Duplicate patient after re-upload
body: I uploaded the same FHIR bundle twice. Expected update/idempotent behavior, but I see what looks like another copy of the patient.

title: Upload button spins forever
body: Import FHIR Bundle never completes for a 4 MB bundle. No error appears, spinner just keeps going.

title: AllergyIntolerance missing after upload
body: The bundle has AllergyIntolerance entries, but allergies are blank on the patient card after upload.

title: MedicationRequest not counted in upload summary
body: Upload summary says zero medications, but the bundle contains MedicationRequest resources.

title: Bad JSON error is too vague
body: When I upload a malformed JSON file the message just says invalid JSON. It does not say which file or where parsing failed.

title: Non-admin cannot see upload panel after role switch
body: Logged in as data_reviewer and expected upload/import tools, but the upload panel is hidden until hard refresh.

title: Upload accepts bundle but source metadata missing
body: Imported patient records show on the chart, but source labels/citations do not include the uploaded filename.

title: SMART patient search returns empty results
body: Searching SMART Health IT sandbox for Smith returns no patients in the app, but the sandbox has matching Patient resources.

title: External FHIR import fails with 502
body: Importing a SMART patient intermittently fails with 502. The UI does not show whether the patient was partially imported.

title: SMART import creates duplicate local patient
body: I imported the same SMART patient twice and got two patient rows instead of an update.

title: External search count ignored
body: I set count to 10 but the panel still shows a tiny result set. Looks like the API limit/count setting is not respected.

title: SMART import never refreshes patient directory
body: After importing from SMART, the success message appears but the patient list stays stale until refresh.

title: External FHIR patient name search is inconsistent
body: Searching patient last name works sometimes, first name often returns unrelated patients.

title: SMART import loses encounter dates
body: Imported SMART patient has encounters but the timeline shows them with missing or unknown dates.

title: External FHIR panel hidden for admin
body: Signed in as admin but the external FHIR import panel did not render on the dashboard.

title: SMART source not shown in citations
body: Records imported from SMART are mixed with local uploads and citation chips do not identify the SMART sandbox source.

title: External import success but audit log missing
body: Imported a SMART patient successfully, but audit logs do not show external_fhir_patient_imported.

title: Patient search misses obvious match
body: Patient directory search does not find Avery when Avery Brooks is visible in the seeded data.

title: Patient list pagination repeats rows
body: When I move through patient list pages, the same patients repeat. Offset does not seem to change results.

title: Patient directory slow with generated hospital data
body: After loading 1000 synthetic patients, the patient directory takes several seconds to search each name.

title: Patient chart opens wrong patient
body: Clicked one patient from search results but the chart header showed a different patient name.

title: No empty state for patient search
body: Searching a non-existent MRN leaves the previous results on screen. It should show no matches.

title: Search query with apostrophe breaks list
body: Searching O'Neil returns a request error instead of filtering patients.

title: Patient list ignores role after sign out
body: I signed out and still saw the patient directory until refreshing the page.

title: Patient cards show unknown demographics too often
body: Several uploaded bundles include birthDate and gender, but the list shows Unknown fields.

title: Search limit max error not surfaced
body: If I call the patient API with limit over 100, the frontend just shows generic failure.

title: Patient list not refreshed after seed script
body: After running seed_demo_data.py, dashboard still says no patients until server restart.

title: Timeline missing encounter event
body: Patient chart shows conditions and observations, but the encounter from the bundle is not on the timeline.

title: Allergy +N more popover hard to open
body: The allergy overflow chip disappears when I move the mouse toward the popover.

title: Medication status displayed incorrectly
body: Stopped medication is shown as active in the patient chart. This is risky for clinical review demos.

title: Condition onset date missing
body: FHIR Condition has onsetDateTime but chart condition list shows no onset date.

title: Observation value units are dropped
body: Recent observations show numeric value but not units, so A1c and BP readings are unclear.

title: Chart page crashes for sparse patient
body: Patient with demographics only opens a blank page. Expected empty sections and quality warnings.

title: Citation chips do not scroll on mobile
body: On the patient detail page, citation chips overflow the card on iPhone width.

title: Timeline sort order looks reversed
body: Older encounters are showing above newer observations. Clinicians expected most recent first.

title: Patient header allergies duplicate
body: Same allergy appears twice in the header after re-uploading the bundle.

title: Chart page shows raw IDs only
body: Some source citations show internal database IDs but not resource type or source system, making review hard.

title: AI summary says no diabetes despite condition
body: Patient has active diabetes condition, but grounded AI summary says no diabetes documented.

title: Care gap missing A1c suggestion
body: Diabetes patient with no A1c observation does not show the Review A1c monitoring care gap.

title: AI insights endpoint returns 404 for existing patient
body: Patient chart loads, but /ai-insights returns Patient not found for the same ID.

title: Hallucination risk high for grounded demo patient
body: All citations resolve, but evaluation still marks hallucination risk high.

title: Unsupported citation not flagged
body: I saw a summary claim with citation ID not present in citations, but evaluation said zero unresolved citations.

title: Care gaps repeat same active condition
body: The care gaps list shows active condition without encounter context multiple times for one patient.

title: AI insights panel slow on chart open
body: Opening patient insights takes around 12 seconds for generated hospital data.

title: Contradiction detection misses resolved vs active
body: Priya Nair test chart should flag same condition as active and resolved, but no inconsistency appears.

title: Citations not clickable in insights
body: Source citation chips are visible but clicking them does not show the source record.

title: AI summary omits allergies section
body: Patient with five allergies gets a summary with conditions and meds but no allergy section.

title: Quality alerts hidden from data reviewer
body: Logged in as data_reviewer. Patient chart loads but quality alerts panel is missing.

title: Missing demographics not flagged
body: Uploaded patient without birthDate and gender but quality alerts say the chart is complete.

title: Quality alerts require admin only
body: Care team expects data_reviewer role to view quality alerts, but API returns unauthorized.

title: Incomplete clinical record warning not specific
body: Quality alert says incomplete record but does not identify missing meds, encounters, or allergies.

title: Sparse patient has no quality warning
body: Sparse diabetes demo patient should show coverage gaps, but no warnings appear.

title: Quality alerts endpoint fails on deleted patient
body: After removing a patient from DB manually, quality alerts endpoint throws 500 instead of 404.

title: Quality alert count differs from UI
body: API returns three quality alerts, but the patient page shows two.

title: No quality alert for no allergy records
body: Patient has no AllergyIntolerance resources and should show No allergy records found.

title: Quality cards overflow on small screen
body: On a laptop split screen, quality alert text overlaps the citation chips.

title: Data quality role can open AI summary
body: Data reviewer role is meant for quality/source metadata, but AI summary is visible after navigation.

title: Patient chat refuses safe question
body: Asked Has this patient had an A1c recently? and the assistant refused as medical advice.

title: Patient chat answer missing citations
body: Chat answered about blood pressure readings but returned zero citations.

title: Patient chat uses another patient evidence
body: Question on patient 3 returned medication details from patient 1.

title: Chat audit log missing question text
body: Patient chat works but audit event metadata does not include the asked question.

title: Chat response says LLM used when disabled
body: With no LLM provider configured, chat response says llm_used true.

title: Patient chat hangs on medication question
body: Asked active medications and the patient chat panel stayed loading until refresh.

title: Chat should not recommend treatment
body: Asked what should we prescribe and it suggested medication changes instead of refusing treatment advice.

title: Chat cannot answer allergy question
body: Patient has allergies but chat says no allergy records documented.

title: Chat citations are unresolved
body: Answer includes citation IDs but they do not match any visible source records on chart.

title: Chat panel loses answer when switching patients
body: I asked a question, navigated back to directory, opened another patient, and old loading state remained.

title: Login fails for seeded demo user
body: Seeded CMIO demo credentials fail with invalid username or password after running seed script.

title: Role label shows underscores
body: Dashboard displays care_coordinator instead of Care Coordinator.

title: Sign out does not clear token
body: After signing out, API calls still succeed until the browser is refreshed.

title: Clinician can see upload tools
body: Logged in as clinician but upload panel is visible. That should be admin/data reviewer only.

title: Auth me endpoint returns old role
body: Changed user role in DB from clinician to admin, but /auth/me still returns clinician.

title: Login page has no error detail
body: Wrong password just clears the form. User needs a visible invalid credentials message.

title: Data reviewer can access AI insights route
body: Direct URL to ai-insights succeeds for data_reviewer even though permissions list does not include grounded summary.

title: Token survives browser tab close
body: User expected session clear, but token persisted and patient charts opened next morning.

title: Demo users panel missing after login
body: Signed in successfully but the Demo Users panel disappeared from dashboard.

title: Unauthorized response not handled
body: When API returns 401, frontend panels keep spinning instead of taking user to sign in.

title: Audit log patient filter ignored
body: Filtering audit logs by patient_id still returns events for all patients.

title: Audit list sorted oldest first
body: Audit log page shows old events first. Reviewers need latest events first.

title: Patient chart access not audited
body: Opening a patient chart does not create patient access audit event for clinician role.

title: AI insight audit missing citation count
body: Viewing insights writes audit event but citation_count is null.

title: Audit log metadata not readable
body: Metadata is displayed as raw JSON in one long line and reviewers cannot scan it.

title: dbt transformation audit accepts bad status
body: Posting status typo to dbt audit route still writes completed event.

title: Audit log action filter case sensitive
body: Searching action user_login works but User_Login returns no results.

title: External FHIR search not audited on failure
body: When SMART search fails with 502 there is no audit record of the attempted search.

title: Audit page visible to clinician
body: Clinician role can open /audit directly even though link is hidden.

title: Audit pagination count wrong
body: Audit endpoint says total 50 while there are more than 200 events after demo run.

title: Generated FHIR bundles missing allergies
body: Pipeline generated patient bundles from raw hospital data but AllergyIntolerance resources are absent.

title: dbt run drops medication status
body: Curated medication_requests view has medication text but status is null for active meds.

title: Stable IDs change across reruns
body: Running same seed and batch id generated different FHIR resource IDs, breaking citations.

title: Generated encounters have end before start
body: Synthetic pipeline produced encounters where end date is before start date.

title: FHIR generator ignores FHIR_LIMIT
body: Set FHIR_LIMIT=25 but generated more than 25 bundle files.

title: dbt schema tests fail silently
body: dbt-run container exits 0 even though staging schema tests fail.

title: Raw load rerun duplicates rows
body: Rerunning generate_hospital_data.py with same source_system and batch id doubled raw diagnoses.

title: Metrics script reports impossible precision
body: measure_demo_metrics.py printed alert precision over 100 percent after seed demo.

title: Pipeline bundle cannot be uploaded
body: Generated FHIR bundle from backend/data/generated_fhir_bundles fails upload as invalid Bundle.

title: dbt audit route not called by pipeline
body: After full Docker pipeline, audit logs do not include dbt_transformation_completed.
